title: French Tart Cream Puffs
description: A classic French dessert with a creamy filling and a crispy almond pastry crust. These cream puffs are sure to impress your guests with their rich flavors and delicate textures.
instructions: Roll out the puff pastry to a thickness of about 1/8 inch and cut into 12 equal squares.
In a small bowl, whisk together the granulated sugar and eggs.
Add the melted butter, ground almonds, and vanilla extract to the sugar mixture and whisk until smooth.
Place a tablespoon of the sugar mixture in the center of each pastry square and fold the pastry into a triangle, pressing the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the pastry with a little bit of water and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
Place the cream puffs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Allow the cream puffs to cool completely on a wire rack.
To make the creamy filling, whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
Spoon the whipped cream into a piping bag and pipe into the cooled cream puffs.
